# Model Card for [Model Name]

## Model Details
- **Model Date:** [Date]
- **Version:** [Version]
- **Model Type:** [e.g. CNN, RNN, Random Forest]
- **Input Format:** [e.g. 32x32x3 image, 128 int8 features]
- **Output:** [e.g. Classification probabilities for 10 classes]
- **License:** [License]
- **Author/Owner:** [Owner Name]

## Intended Use
- **Primary Use Case:** [Describe intended application]
- **Out of Scope Use Cases:** [What should this model NOT be used for?]
- **Target Platform:** [Hardware requirements]

## Training Data
- **Dataset:** [Name and link to dataset]
- **Preprocessing:** [Normalization, augmentation, etc.]
- **Data Split:** [Train/Test/Validation ratio]

## Performance
- **Accuracy:** [Metric on test set]
- **Latency:** [Inference time on target hardware]
- **Memory Footprint:** [Flash/RAM usage]
- **Robustness:** [Performance on noisy data]

## Ethical Considerations & Limitations
- **Bias:** [Known biases in training data]
- **Risks:** [Potential negative impacts of failure]
- **MITIGATIONS:** [Steps taken to mitigate risks]

## EU AI Act Compliance Notes
- **Risk Category:** [High/Limited/Minimal]
- **Human Oversight:** [Description of human-in-the-loop features]
- **Logging:** [What events are logged during operation]
